D4 Colorimetry L4 Analyze Reference

The 1976 u'v' Diagram

toggle between xy and u'v' and watch the cramped green corner of the chart stretch into a fairer map

Equal steps on the 1931 xy diagram are not equally visible — green is compressed. The 1976 u'v' transform stretches it so that distances better match perception.

Toggle between the 1931 xy and 1976 u'v' diagrams. Both hold the same colours bounded by the same spectral locus, but watch the green region expand and the blue corner relax as the map becomes more uniform.
